pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates the jdoe user via wp-cli and injects 4 published posts and 2 drafts.
The task explicitly requires creating this username, and export_result.sh checks for its existence.
The task explicitly requires this email, and export_result.sh retrieves it.
The task explicitly requires the Author role, and export_result.sh retrieves the role.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates the asmith user via wp-cli to ensure collateral damage does not occur.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated WordPress users and posts injected via wp-cli. The target user jdoe is meant to be offboarded, with their 4 published posts reassigned to a new user editorial_archives (email: archives@localnews.com, role: author) while their 2 drafts are trashed. A bystander user asmith is verified to ensure no collateral damage occurs.
